author: ANcpLua
name: ANcpLua Web (Minimal API)
description: An ANcpLua-flavored ASP.NET Core minimal API solution: src/ (uses ANcpLua.NET.Sdk.Web) + tests/ + slnx + Central Package Management.

TargetFramework.description: Target framework for the web app and tests.

DotNetSdkVersion.description: .NET SDK version pinned in global.json (with rollForward=latestFeature). Defaults to the version this template pack was built against.

SdkVersion.description: ANcpLua.NET.Sdk(.Web/.Test) version pinned in global.json msbuild-sdks. Defaults to the version this template pack ships with.

skipRestore.description: Skip the automatic restore of the project on create.

postActions.description: Restore NuGet packages required by this project.
